_meta.description: MX hostname patterns for forwarding-only mail providers commonly used by both legitimate small-domain owners AND carders setting up catch-all signup farms. A match is a SOFT SIGNAL — surface it to the integrator and let them decide. Do NOT auto-block on MX alone; combine with the 'no website' signal (HTTP HEAD on https://<domain>) for stronger confidence.
_meta.license: MIT — same as the parent repo
_meta.policy: Hand-curated from EmailAlias.io's observed carder patterns. Pattern is matched as a SUFFIX against each MX exchange hostname (case-insensitive). Only add a provider here if it is genuinely used as a catch-all forwarding service AND we have seen it in actual abuse logs.
